heading.purpose: Page titles: UMKM name, Katalog, Daftarkan UMKM Kamu.

shadows.name: interactive-lift
shadows.purpose: Hover state for product cards, UMKM cards, category chips only. Never applied at rest.

motion.name: ease-signature
motion.purpose: The system's one signature easing curve, used for the stacked swipe carousel and tilted product mosaic on the homepage.

components.name: WhatsApp Button
components.description: The single most important CTA in the product: opens wa.me with a prefilled message.
components.css: .ds-btn-whatsapp { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; min-height: 44px; padding: 12px 20px; border-radius: 9999px; background: #25d366; color: #ffffff; font-weight: 700; border: none; transition: background 0.2s ease, transform 0.1s ease; } .ds-btn-whatsapp .ds-icon { width: 20px; height: 20px; } .ds-btn-whatsapp:hover { background: #128c7e; } .ds-btn-whatsapp:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #128c7e; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-whatsapp:active { transform: scale(0.98); }

components.name: Primary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { min-height: 44px; padding: 12px 24px; border-radius: 9999px; background: #16a34a; color: #ffffff; font-weight: 700; border: none; transition: background 0.2s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #15803d; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #15803d; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Accent CTA Button
components.description: Reserved for the single highest-priority action per screen (e.g. homepage 'Daftarkan UMKM' banner).
components.css: .ds-btn-accent { min-height: 44px; padding: 12px 24px; border-radius: 9999px; background: #f97316; color: #ffffff; font-weight: 700; border: none; transition: background 0.2s ease; } .ds-btn-accent:hover { background: #ea580c; }

components.name: Product Card
components.description: Catalog grid item: photo, name, shop, price. Flat at rest, lifts on hover.
components.html:
Nasi Ayam Geprek

Warung Nasi Bu Siti

Rp15.000
components.css: .ds-card-product { display: block; border-radius: 1rem; border: 1px solid #e5e5e5; background: #ffffff; overflow: hidden; transition: transform 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease; } .ds-card-product:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1), 0 2px 4px -2px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1); } .ds-card-product-photo { aspect-ratio: 1; background: #f0fdf4; } .ds-card-product-body { padding: 12px; } .ds-card-product-name { font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; color: #171717; } .ds-card-product-shop { font-size: 0.75rem; color: #737373; } .ds-card-product-price { font-weight: 700; color: #15803d; }

components.name: Category Chip
components.description: Homepage category filter chip: icon in a circle + label.
components.css: .ds-chip-category { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 8px; min-width: 76px; padding: 12px 16px; border-radius: 1rem; border: 1px solid #e5e5e5; background: #ffffff; text-decoration: none; transition: transform 0.2s ease, border-color 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease; } .ds-chip-category:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); border-color: #bbf7d0; box-shadow: 0 1px 3px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1); } .ds-chip-category-icon { display: grid; place-items: center; width: 44px; height: 44px; border-radius: 9999px; background: #f0fdf4; color: #15803d; } .ds-chip-category-label { font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; color: #404040; }

components.name: Status Badge
components.description: Buka/Tutup and Pending/Active status pills used on UMKM cards and admin tables.
components.css: .ds-badge-open { display: inline-block; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 9999px; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; background: #dcfce7; color: #15803d; } .ds-badge-closed { display: inline-block; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 9999px; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; background: #f5f5f5; color: #737373; }

components.name: Bottom Tab Bar Item
components.description: Mobile-only fixed bottom navigation item; active state swaps outline icon for solid + green-700.
components.html: Home
components.css: .ds-tab-item { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 2px; min-height: 56px; min-width: 64px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; color: #737373; text-decoration: none; } .ds-tab-item .ds-icon { width: 24px; height: 24px; } .ds-tab-item-active { color: #15803d; }

narrative.overview: Warlok looks like the neighborhood it serves: unmistakably a working marketplace tool (Shopee/Tokopedia/GoFood-familiar grids, badges, and filters), never a cold enterprise dashboard and never a decorated tech-startup landing page. Every screen should feel like it was built by someone who actually shops at the corner warung, not by someone designing an abstract local-commerce concept from a boardroom. The palette leads with a confident, saturated green with a warm orange accent reserved for calls to action. Surfaces stay flat and bright by default; depth is earned only through interaction, never applied as ambient decoration.
keyCharacteristics: Pill-shaped buttons and inputs everywhere; no sharp rectangular CTAs.
WhatsApp green (#25D366) is reserved exclusively for the 'Pesan via WhatsApp' action.
Flat, bordered cards at rest; shadow and lift appear only on hover/interaction.
Mobile-first with a persistent bottom tab bar.

rules.name: The Sacred Green Rule
rules.body: WhatsApp green (#25D366) appears on exactly one element type: the 'Pesan via WhatsApp' button. Use Warlok Green (#16a34a) for every other primary affordance.

rules.name: The One-Family Rule
rules.body: Every weight comes from Plus Jakarta Sans. No second typeface family.

rules.name: The Flat-Until-Touched Rule
rules.body: No card, chip, or button carries a shadow at rest. Shadow signals interactivity together with a hover lift, never as ambient depth.

dos: Do keep every actionable button fully pill-shaped (rounded-full).
Do reserve WhatsApp green for the WhatsApp CTA only.
Do keep cards flat and bordered at rest, with shadow arriving only on hover.
Do default to patterns Shopee/Tokopedia/GoFood users already know.
Do maintain >=44x44px touch targets and >=4.5:1 text contrast throughout.
donts: Don't use corporate/cold enterprise SaaS aesthetics.
Don't use generic AI-template landing-page grammar: gradient text, tracked eyebrows, 01/02/03 scaffolding, identical card grids.
Don't fabricate realism: no fake reviews, no stock storefronts, no invented urgency.
Don't introduce a second typeface family.
Don't apply ambient shadows to elements at rest.
